title: hovea longifolia var. pannosa
intro: Hovea longifolia var. pannosa, also known as the sensitive pea or sensitive hovea, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb with delicate, pink or white flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and relieve symptoms of anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of Hovea longifolia var. pannosa typically involve using the plant's leaves and flowers in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
